zh.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough於1765年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡羅來納州。她於1779年與Charles Overman在美國北卡羅來納州結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1842年在美國印第安納州克拉克享年78歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough于1765年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加北卡罗来纳州。她于1779年与Charles Overman在美国北卡罗来纳州结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1842年在美国印第安纳州克拉克享年78岁。

nameMeanings.name: Scarborough
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lincolnshire and Yorkshire): habitational name from Scarborough (North Yorkshire), from the Old Norse personal name Skarthi + Old Norse borg ‘fortress, fortified town’.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moira
meanings: Anglicized form of Irish Máire , now used throughout the English-speaking world.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Tryon Palace
historicEvents.description: Built on August 26, 1767, the Tryon Palace became the capitol building for North Carolina. The building was named after William Tryon a British officer and colonial official.
Thomas Jefferson's American Declaration of Independence endorsed by Congress. Colonies declare independence.

historicEvents.title: Shays' Rebellion
historicEvents.description: Caused by war veteran Daniel Shays, Shays' Rebellion was to protest economic and civil rights injustices that he and other farmers were seeing after the Revolutionary War. Because of the Rebellion it opened the eyes of the governing officials that the Articles of Confederation needed a reform. The Rebellion served as a guardrail when helping reform the United States Constitution.
Historical Boundaries: 1801: Clark, Indiana Territory, United States 1816: Clark, Indiana, United States

historicEvents.title: The Second Great Awakening
historicEvents.description: Being a second spiritual and religious awakening, like the First Great Awakening, many Churches began to spring up from other denominations. Many people began to rapidly join the Baptist and Methodist congregations. Many converts to these religions believed that the Awakening was the precursor of a new millennial age.

historicEvents.title: The Massive Internal Improvements Act
historicEvents.description: The Massive Internal Improvements Act of 1836 loaned Indiana $10,000,000 to create infrastructure such as canals, railroads, and roads across the state. The act was signed by Whig Governor Noah Noble and passed by the Indiana General Assembly. However, the financial crisis known as the Panic of 1837 thwarted these plans as costs ballooned. Construction on the infrastructure was not completed and the state debt rapidly increased.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough was born in 1765, in North Carolina, British Colonial America. She married Charles Overman in 1779, in North Carolina, United States. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. She died about 1842, in Clark, Indiana, United States, at the age of 78.

fr.North Carolina, British Colonial America: Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique
fr.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough est née en 1765, à Caroline du Nord, Amérique coloniale britannique. Elle a épousé Charles Overman en 1779, à Caroline du Nord, États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1842, à Clark, Indiana, États-Unis, à l’âge de 78 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough wurde 1765 in North Carolina, British Colonial America geboren. Sie hat 1779 in North Carolina, Vereinigte Staaten Charles Overman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb um 1842 im Alter von 78 Jahren in Clark, Indiana, Vereinigte Staaten.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarboroughは1765年にイギリス植民地アメリカノースカロライナ州で生まれた。1779年にアメリカ合衆国ノースカロライナ州でCharles Overmanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1842年にアメリカ合衆国インディアナ州クラークで78歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough(은)는 1765년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1779년 미국 노스캐롤라이나 주에서 Charles Overman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1842년 미국 인디애나 주 클라르크에서 78세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Mary Ann Scarborough родилась в 1765 г. в местности Северная Каролина, бритиш колоняль амирика. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Charles Overman в 1779 г. в местности Северная Каролина, Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла около 1842 г. в местности кларк, Индиана, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 78 лет.
